briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the uninitialized object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_init() is called with a valid index and a memory area to store object values
Then a pointer to the object is returned, the object is initialized with a given index and an object code is set to CO_OBJECT_VAR calls rbnode_init() calls rbtree_init()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the initialized object (co_obj_t) inserted into a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_fini() is called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) not inserted into a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_prev() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a single sub-object, the object is inserted into a device which does not contain any other objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_prev() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a single sub-object, the object was removed from a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_prev() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a single sub-object, the object is inserted into a device with another object added before it

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_prev() is called
Then a pointer to the previous object is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) not inserted into a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_next() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a single sub-object, the object is inserted into a device, which does not contain any other object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_next() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a single sub-object, the object is removed from a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_next() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a single sub-object, the object is inserted into a device with another object after it

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_next() is called
Then a pointer to the next object is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) not inserted into a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_dev() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a single sub-object, the object is inserted into a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_dev() is called
Then a pointer to the device is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) with a valid index value

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_idx() is called
Then the object index is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) without any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_subidx() is called with no array for returned sub-indices
Then 0 is returned calls rbtree_size() and returns its result

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) without any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_subidx() is called with a memory area to return sub-indices
Then 0 is returned and array is not modified calls rbtree_first() calls rbtree_size() and returns its result

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing two sub-objects, the object is inserted into a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_subidx() is called with a memory area to return one sub-index
Then 2 is returned and the array contains the sub-index of the second inserted sub-object calls rbtree_first() calls rbnode_next() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls rbtree_size() and returns its result

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t), and another object containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_insert_sub() is called with a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) from another object
Then -1 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_find_sub() is called with a pointer to the sub-object it already contains
Then 0 is returned, the object still contains the sub-object calls rbtree_find() calls rbtree_insert() if !LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls co_obj_update()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_insert_sub() is called with a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) that has the same sub-index as the sub-object already contained in the object
Then -1 is returned and the first sub-object remains in the device calls rbtree_find()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_insert_sub() is called with a pointer to a sub-object
Then 0 is returned and the sub-object is inserted into the object calls rbtree_find() calls rbtree_insert() if !LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls co_obj_update()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t), and another object containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_remove_sub() is called with a sub-object from the other object
Then -1 is returned and the first object still contains the sub-object

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_remove_sub() is called with a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) contained in the device

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_find_sub() is called with a sub-index of the sub-object
Then a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) is returned calls rbtree_find()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) not containing any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_find_sub() is called with a sub-index
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbtree_find()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_first_sub() is called
Then a pointer to the sub-object is returned calls rbtree_find()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) not containing any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_first_sub() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbtree_find()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_last_sub() is called
Then a pointer to the sub-object is returned calls rbtree_last()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) not containing any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_last_sub() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbtree_last()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para:
When co_obj_set_code() is called with one of the following:
CO_OBJECT_NULL
CO_OBJECT_DOMAIN
CO_OBJECT_DEFTYPE
CO_OBJECT_DEFSTRUCT
CO_OBJECT_VAR
CO_OBJECT_ARRAY
CO_OBJECT_RECORD
Then 0 is returned and the requested object code is set

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_code() is called with an invalid code
Then -1 is returned, ERRNUM_INVAL error number set

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_addressof_val() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) initialized with a null pointer as a memory area to store its values

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_addressof_val() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object with a set value

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_addressof_val() is called
Then a non-null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_sizeof_val() is called
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the empty object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_sizeof_val() is called
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing the sub-object of a selected type

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_sizeof_val() is called
Then a size of the selected type is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_val() is called with a sub-index
Then a null pointer is returned calls co_sub_get_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) without any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_get_val() is called with a sub-index
Then a null pointer is returned calls co_obj_find_sub() calls co_sub_get_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) without any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_val() is called with a sub-index, a memory area containing a value
Then 0 is returned and the value is not set calls co_obj_find_sub() calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_val() is called with a subindex, a memory area containing a value
Then the value size is returned and the requested value is set calls co_obj_find_sub() calls co_sub_set_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_dn_ind() is called with an indicator function and a pointer to the user-specified data
Then the requested indicator and the data pointer are set calls co_sub_set_dn_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing many sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_dn_ind() is called with an indicator function and a pointer to the user-specified data
Then the requested indicator and the data pointer are set calls co_sub_set_dn_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) without any sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_dn_ind() is called with null pointers
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing a sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_up_ind() is called with an upload indicator function and a pointer to the user-specified data
Then the requested indicator and the data pointer are set calls co_sub_set_up_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) containing many sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_up_ind() is called with an upload indicator function and a pointer to the user-specified data
Then the requested indicator and the data pointer are set calls co_sub_set_up_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the object (co_obj_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_obj_set_up_ind() is called with null pointers
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the uninitialized sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_init() is called with a subindex, a data type and no memory area to store values

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_init() is called with a sub-index, a data type and no memory area to store values

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the uninitialized sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_init() is called with a sub-index, a data type and no memory area to store values

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_fini() is called

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object with another sub-object before it

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_prev() is called
Then a pointer to the other sub-object (co_sub_t) is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) not inserted into any object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_prev() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the only sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_prev() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) which was removed from the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_prev() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_prev()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object with another sub-object after it

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_next() is called
Then a pointer to the other sub-object (co_sub_t) is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) not inserted into any object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_next() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the only sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_next() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) which was removed from the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_next() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls rbnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_obj() is called
Then a pointer to the object (co_obj_t) is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_subidx() is called
Then a sub-index is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_type() is called
Then the sub-object data type is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_addressof_min() is called
Then a null pointer is returned calls co_val_addressof()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_addressof_min() is called
Then a pointer to the value of lower limit of the sub-object's value is returned calls co_val_addressof()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_sizeof_min() is called
Then 0 is returned calls co_val_sizeof()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_sizeof_min()) is called
Then the size of the value of the lower limit of the sub-object value is returned calls co_val_sizeof()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_min() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_min() is called with a memory area containing the lower limit value
Then the size of the lower limit value is returned and the limit is set calls co_val_fini() calls co_val_make()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_addressof_max() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_addressof_max() is called
Then a pointer to the value of the upper limit of the sub-object value is returned calls co_val_addressof()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_sizeof_max() is called
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_sizeof_max() is called
Then the size of the value of the upper limit of the sub-object value is returned /Calls co_val_sizeof()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_max() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_max() is called with a memory area containing the upper limit value
Then the size of the upper limit value is returned and the limit is set /Calls co_val_fini() /Calls co_val_make()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_addressof_val() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_addressof_val() is called
Then a pointer to the sub-object value is returned calls co_val_addressof()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_sizeof_val() is called
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_sizeof_val() is called
Then the size of the sub-object value is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_val() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) inserted into the object

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_val() is called with a memory area containing a value
Then the size of the sub-object value is returned and the value is set calls co_val_fini() calls co_val_make()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) of a non-basic type

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_chk_val() is called with the sub-object type and a null pointer
Then 0 is returned calls co_type_is_basic()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) of a basic type

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_chk_val() is called with an incorrect type and a null pointer
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN abort code is returned calls co_type_is_basic()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) with limits set incorrectly (the upper limit below the lower limit

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_chk_val() is called with the sub-object type and a memory area containing a value
Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_RANGE abort code is returned calls co_type_is_basic() calls co_val_cmp()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) with the upper limit set

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_chk_val() is called with the sub-object type and a memory area containing a value above the upper limit
Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_HI abort code is returned calls co_type_is_basic() calls co_val_cmp()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) with the lower limit set

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_chk_val() is called with the sub-object type and a memory area containing a value below the lower limit
Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_LO abort code is returned calls co_type_is_basic() calls co_val_cmp()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) with the upper and the lower limits set

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_chk_val() is called with the sub-object type and a memory area containing a value within limits
Then 0 is returned calls co_type_is_basic() calls co_val_cmp()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para:
When co_sub_set_access() is called with one of the following:
CO_ACCESS_RO
CO_ACCESS_WO
CO_ACCESS_RW
CO_ACCESS_RWR
CO_ACCESS_RWW
CO_ACCESS_CONST
Then 0 is returned and requested access code is set

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_access() is called with an invalid access type
Then -1 is returned, ERRNUM_INVAL error number is set calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_pdo_mapping() is called with a non-zero integer
Then PDO mapping of the sub-object is enabled

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_flags() is called with a set of object flags
Then the requested flags are set

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_dn_ind() is called with null pointers
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_dn_ind() is called with null pointers
Then the sub-object download indication functions is set to the default indication function, the custom data is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_dn_ind() is called with a null pointer and a non-null pointer to the user-specified data
Then the sub-object download indication function is set to the default indication function, the custom data is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_dn_ind() is called with a pointer to the download indication function and a non-null pointer to the user-specified data
Then the sub-object download indication and user-specified data are set to requested values

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) and an empty SDO download request

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_dn() is called with a pointer to the request and a pointer to an abort code
Then -1 is returned, the abort code is set to CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_LO calls co_sub_get_type() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls co_type_is_array() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) with a value limit set and an SDO download request with a value outside the limit

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_dn() is called with a pointer to the request and a null abort code pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) with a value limit set and an SDO download request with a value outside the limit

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_dn() is called with a pointer to the request and a pointer to an abort code

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) of a basic data type and an SDO download request with any value of that data type

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_dn() is called with a pointer to the request and a pointer to an abort code

Then 0 is returned, the abort code is not changed, the value from the request is downloaded to the sub-object calls co_sub_get_type() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls co_type_is_array() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_chk_val() calls co_sub_dn() if !LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls co_val_fini()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) of an array data type and an SDO download request with any value of that data type

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_dn() is called with a pointer to the request and a pointer to an abort code

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn_ind() is called with no SDO download request
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) with read-only access

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn_ind() is called with no SDO download request
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_WRITE abort code is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn_ind() is called with no SDO download request
Then CO_SDO_AC_ERROR abort code is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to sub-object (co_sub_t) with a custom download indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn_ind() is called with an SDO download request
Then 0 is returned and the indication function is called calls co_sub_default_dn_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn_ind_val() is called with any data type different than that of the sub-object and with any pointers to value and memory buffer
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) of a basic data type

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn_ind_val() is called with the data type of the sub-object, a pointer to any value of that data type and a null memory buffer pointer
Then 0 is returned, the sub-object's download indication function is called calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_init() calls co_sdo_req_up_val() calls co_sub_dn_ind() calls co_sdo_req_fini()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) of an array data type

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn_ind_val() is called with the data type of the sub-object, a pointer to any value of that data type and a pointer to a memory buffer
Then 0 is returned, the sub-object's download indication function is called calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_init() calls co_sdo_req_up_val() calls co_sub_dn_ind() calls co_sdo_req_fini()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) with the refuse-write-on-download flag set

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn() is called with any pointer to a value
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn() is called with a pointer to any value of sub-object's data type, but writing of the value fails
Then -1 is returned, nothing is changed calls co_val_copy()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_dn() is called with a pointer to any value of sub-object's data type

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_get_up_ind() is called with null pointers
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_up_ind() is called with null pointers
Then the sub-object upload indication functions is set to the default indication function, the user-specified data is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_up_ind() is called with a null pointer and a non-null pointer to the user-specified data
Then the sub-object upload indication functions is set to the default indication function, the user-specified data is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_set_up_ind() is called with a pointer to the upload indication function and a non-null pointer to the user-specified data
Then the sub-object upload indication and the user-specified data are set to requested values

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) initialized with a null value pointer and an initialized SDO upload request

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_up() is called with a pointer to the request and a null abort code pointer
Then -1 is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) initialized with a null value pointer and an initialized SDO upload request

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_up() is called with a pointer to the request and a pointer to an abort code
Then -1 is returned, the abort code is set to CO_SDO_AC_NO_DATA calls co_sub_get_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) and an initialized SDO upload request

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_on_up() is called with a pointer to the request and a pointer to an abort code
Then 0 is returned, the abort code is not changed, the request contains the sub-object's value calls co_sub_get_val() calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_up_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a null pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_up_ind() function is called with no SDO upload request
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t) with write-only access

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_up_ind() is called with no SDO upload request
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_READ abort code is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the sub-object (co_sub_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_up_ind() is called with no SDO upload request
Then CO_SDO_AC_ERROR abort code is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to sub-object (co_sub_t) with a custom upload indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When co_sub_up_ind() is called with an SDO upload request
Then 0 is returned and the indication function is called calls co_sub_default_up_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) with the default download indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When the sub-object's download indication function is called with a non-zero SDO abort code and any pointers to an SDO download request and user-specified data
Then the abort code is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) with the default download indication function set and an SDO download request with any value of sub-object's data type

detaileddescription.para: When the sub-object's download indication function is called with a pointer to the request, zero SDO abort code and any pointer to user-specified data
Then 0 is returned, the value from the request is downloaded to the sub-object calls co_sub_on_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) with the default upload indication function set

detaileddescription.para: When the sub-object's upload indication function is called with a non-zero SDO abort code
Then the abort code is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a sub-object (co_sub_t) with the default upload indication function set and an initialized SDO upload request

detaileddescription.para: When the sub-object's upload indication function is called with a pointer to the request, zero SDO abort code and any pointer to user-specified data
Then 0 is returned, the request contains the sub-object's value calls co_sub_on_up()

memberdef.name: LELY_CO_DEFINE_TYPE
memberdef.initializer: TEST(CO_Obj, CoObjGetVal_##a##_Null) { \ CHECK_EQUAL(0x0, co_obj_get_val_##c(nullptr, 0x00)); \ } \ \ TEST(CO_Obj, CoObjGetVal_##a##_SubNotFound) { \ CHECK_EQUAL(0x0, co_obj_get_val_##c(obj, 0x00)); \ } \ \ TEST(CO_Obj, CoObjSetVal_##a##_SubNotFound) { \ CHECK_EQUAL(0x0, co_obj_set_val_##c(obj, 0x00, 0x42)); \ } \ \ TEST(CO_Obj, CoObjSetVal_##a) { \ const co_##b##_t val = 0x42; \ CoSubTHolder sub(SUB_IDX, CO_DEFTYPE_##a); \ CHECK(obj_holder->InsertSub(sub) != nullptr); \ \ const auto ret = co_obj_set_val_##c(obj, SUB_IDX, val); \ \ CHECK_EQUAL(sizeof(val), ret); \ CHECK_EQUAL(val, co_obj_get_val_##c(obj, SUB_IDX)); \ }

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.

detaileddescription.para:
